title: panicum virgatum
intro: Panicum virgatum, also known as switchgrass, is a perennial grass native to North America, commonly found growing in wetlands and prairies. The medicinal properties of switchgrass include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of switchgrass include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and improve respiratory health. Switchgrass is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in tinctures or salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
